channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Iran-linked attack in Jordan kills 2 U.S. troops, CENTCOM says
item.description: Two U.S. service members were killed and another is missing after missile and drone attacks on an American base in Jordan, CENTCOM said.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] 3-year-old killed after being hit by truck in Winter Haven: PCSO
item.description: The Polk County Sheriff’s Office says it is investigating a fatal crash from Friday night that claimed the life of a 3-year-old girl.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] What is Invest 91L? Here’s what the designation really means
[WATCHLIST: hurricane] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] FPL hosts first-ever Touch-A-Truck Hurricane Expo in Bradenton

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Lindsey Graham’s sister Darlene encouraged by Trump to seek full Senate term
item.description: Trump urged Darline Graham, sister of late Sen. Lindsey Graham, to run for a full Senate term in South Carolina’s special GOP primary.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 3-year-old girl struck, killed by pickup truck in Winter Haven neighborhood: PCSO
item.description: A 3-year-old girl died Friday night after being struck by a pickup truck in a southeast Winter Haven neighborhood, according to the Polk County Sheriff’s Office (PCSO).

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Family-owned restaurant serves customized crust options for pizza pies with local produce
item.description: For 27 years, South Tampa residents have been treated to a handcrafted pizzeria that's family-owned and dedicated to making their customers feel special. The Gourmet Pizza Company counts their success to their commitment to fresh produce, high-quality ingredients and making each customer happy on every visit.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Motorcyclist killed in crash with SUV, troopers say

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Motorcyclist dies after crash at Pasco County intersection: FHP
item.description: A 30-year-old New Port Richey man died after a motorcycle crash early Saturday morning in Pasco County, according to Florida Highway Patrol (FHP).

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Britain’s Josh Kerr breaks long-standing mile world record
item.description: Josh Kerr broke a 27-year-old world record in the mile, running 3:42.66 at the Diamond League event in London.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Canadian wildfire smoke sparks calls for sanctions from Republicans
item.description: Republicans are blaming Canada for wildfire smoke drifting into the U.S., with Sen. Bernie Moreno proposing sanctions over air quality concerns.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Why Americans call it soccer while the rest of the world calls it football
item.description: Americans call it soccer, but the rest of the world calls it football. The reason goes back to 19th-century England.
